title: Try and Get It
writer: Jules Furthman, Eugene P. Lyle Jr.
actors: Bryant Washburn, Billie Dove, Edward Everett Horton
plot: Two young bill collectors, Joseph Merrill (Bryant Washburn) and Glenn Collins (Edward Everett Horton), must collect a debt owed by Timothy Perrin (Lionel Belmore), cement manufacturer and backer of a women's dress shop, or lose th...
